nasb.text: You have rebuked the nations, You have destroyed the wicked; You have blotted out their name forever and ever.

esv.text: You have rebuked the nations; you have made the wicked perish; you have blotted out their name forever and ever.

cnv.text: 你斥責了列國，滅絕了惡人； 你塗抹了他們的名，直到永永遠遠。

ccb.text: 你斥责列国，消灭恶人， 永永远远抹去他们的名字。

csbs.text: 你斥责了列国，消灭了恶人， 抹掉了他们的名号，直到永永远远。
